markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the content workflow to improve quality and publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workflow Overhaul:** GrowthX will update its Atlas pipeline to fix quality issues (e.g., repetition, technical errors) by adding a U.com product-check stage and simplifying top-of-funnel personas.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**New Review Process:** Brooke will now focus on high-level content edits, sending articles back to GrowthX for revision before adding final stylistic touches. This ensures GrowthX's pipeline learns from feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Q1 Strategic Shift:** The team will prioritize top-of-funnel content to increase publishing velocity. A dedicated planning session next week will align on 2026 goals and explore programmatic SEO to scale content without scaling Brooke's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [**Product Documentation:** Brooke provided You.com's product documentation, which GrowthX will integrate into the Atlas pipeline to automate accuracy checks and reduce the need for manual SME review.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Workflow Bottlenecks

  - [Brooke's detailed edits on recent articles revealed workflow issues blocking publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Primary Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Repetitive text between the TLDR and intro.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [Technical inaccuracies about You.com's product capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [Overly complex language for top-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A disconnect between the Atlas pipeline's output and You.com's quality bar, compounded by a lack of clear guidelines for Brooke's review.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Atlas Pipeline Enhancements

  - [GrowthX will update its Atlas content pipeline to address the identified issues.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Planned Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Persona Simplification:** Reduce technical expectations for top-of-funnel personas → better match search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Repetition Check:** Add a pipeline stage to flag TLDR/intro repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Product Accuracy Check:** Add a stage to validate product claims against You.com's documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Clarification:** A human editor already reviews all content before delivery. The TLDR/intro repetition is a deliberate SEO tactic for LLM visibility, a trade-off for You.com to decide on.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### New Review Process & SME Integration

  - [The new review process will differentiate between high-level content edits and final stylistic changes.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**New Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
    1.  [Brooke focuses on high-level edits (accuracy, structure).](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
    2.  [Articles are sent back to GrowthX for revision.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
    3.  [Brooke adds final stylistic touches before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This ensures GrowthX's pipeline learns from feedback, preventing recurring errors.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**SME Integration:** For technical content, the goal is to codify SME knowledge into documentation *before* content creation. This enables GrowthX to build a custom pipeline for that content stream, automating accuracy checks and reducing the need for manual SME review.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)

### Q1 Strategy & Scaling

  - [Justin Fink, You.com's new marketing lead, joined to align the partnership with 2026 goals and ensure content throughput is justified.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Q1 Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [**Prioritize Top-of-Funnel Content:** This stream requires less technical review → faster publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
      - [**Programmatic SEO:** Explore templated content (e.g., comparison pages) to scale output without scaling Brooke's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [**December Reporting:** Early signals are positive, with articles indexing naturally and generating clicks. Key metrics to track are LLM visibility (top-answer position) and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Update Atlas pipeline with new checks and personas.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Reshare updated writing guidelines and personas with Brooke.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Integrate You.com's product documentation into the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Schedule the Q1 planning session for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [Review the remaining backlog (19 articles) using the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [Flag any articles needing a full re-run through the updated pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
      - [Attend the Q1 planning session next week to align on goals and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DzzWS4RnDUHRTfftZv7MdWHS1MJqEZSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
